aiCommentEN: Market is calm, but hearts are racing.
aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
比特币短期走势或将震荡调整。
【关键位置】
支撑位：68,000 美元，阻力位：71,000 美元。
【走势推演】
若跌破支撑位，可能下探 66,000 美元。
【一句提醒】
注意风险，保持仓位灵活。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin's short-term trend may fluctuate and adjust.
[Key Drivers]
Support level: $68,000, Resistance level: $71,000.
[Outlook]
If it breaks through the support level, it may drop to $66,000.
[Reminder]
Be aware of the risk and keep your position flexible.
